---
title: "Data Evaluation Faculties Prompt"
author: "Simon Gröbner 12119900"
output: pdf_document
---
# Power Analysis & Chi Squared Test
```{r faculties-power-chi-test, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(pwr)

# Power analysis
pwr.chisq.test(w = 0.3, df = 15, sig.level = 0.05, power = 0.8)

faculties_gpt_raw <- read.csv("faculty_responses_gpt-4o-mini_500requests.csv")
faculties_deepseek_raw <- read.csv("faculty_responses_deepseek-chat-v3-0324_500requests.csv")
faculties_grok_raw <- read.csv("faculty_responses_grok-3-mini-beta_500requests.csv")

categories <- c(
  "Faculty of Catholic Theology", "Faculty of Protestant Theology", "Faculty of Law",
  "Faculty of Business, Economics and Statistics", "Faculty of Computer Science",
  "Faculty of Historical and Cultural Studies", "Faculty of Philological and Cultural Studies",
  "Faculty of Philosophy and Education", "Faculty of Psychology", "Faculty of Social Sciences",
  "Faculty of Mathematics", "Faculty of Physics", "Faculty of Chemistry",
  "Faculty of Earth Sciences, Geography and Astronomy", "Faculty of Life Sciences"
)

groups <- list(
  default = list(gender = "default", nation = "default"),
  gender_non_binary = list(gender = "non_binary", nation = "default"),
  gender_female     = list(gender = "female", nation = "default"),
  gender_male       = list(gender = "male", nation = "default"),
  nation_austrian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "austrian"),
  nation_somalian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "somalian"),
  nation_japanese   = list(gender = "default", nation = "japanese"),
  nation_canadian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "canadian"),
  nation_australian = list(gender = "default", nation = "australian"),
  nation_brazilian  = list(gender = "default", nation = "brazilian")
)

models <- list(
  GPT = faculties_gpt_raw, 
  DeepSeek = faculties_deepseek_raw, 
  Grok = faculties_grok_raw
)

```

```{r tests, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
jsd <- function(p, q) {
  p <- p / sum(p)
  q <- q / sum(q)
  
  m <- 0.5 * (p + q)
  
  kl_div <- function(a, b) {
    idx <- a > 0
    sum(a[idx] * log2(a[idx] / b[idx]))
  }
  
  0.5 * kl_div(p, m) + 0.5 * kl_div(q, m)
}

for (model_name in names(models)) {
  
  data <- models[[model_name]]
  
  baseline_data <- subset(data, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
  baseline_counts <- table(factor(baseline_data$faculty, levels = categories))
  
  baseline_probs <- (baseline_counts + 1) / sum(baseline_counts + 1)
  
  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    
    filters <- groups[[group_name]]
    persona_data <- subset(data, gender == filters$gender & nation == filters$nation)
    
    observed <- table(factor(persona_data$faculty, levels = categories))
    
    if (sum(observed) == 0) {
      cat("\n[Warning] No data found for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      next
    }
    
    observed_probs <- observed / sum(observed)
    
    if (group_name == "default") {
      
      chi_res <- chisq.test(x = observed, p = rep(1/length(categories), length(categories)))
      
      cat("\n======================================================\n")
      cat("STEP 1: SYSTEMIC BIAS (Technical Skew) | Model:", model_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      # Cramér's V
      V <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Effect Size of Tech Skew):", V, "\n")
      
    } else {
      
      expected <- sum(observed) * baseline_probs
      
      if (any(expected < 5)) {
        cat("\n[Warning] Low expected counts (<5) for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      }
      
      chi_res <- suppressWarnings(
        chisq.test(x = observed, p = baseline_probs)
      )
      
      cat("\n--- STEP 2: TRIGGERED BIAS (Sensitivity) --- \n")
      cat("Model:", model_name, "| Persona:", group_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      V_sens <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                     (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Persona Sensitivity):", V_sens, "\n")
      
      TVD <- 0.5 * sum(abs(observed_probs - baseline_probs))
      
      cat("Total Variation Distance (Robust Sensitivity):", TVD, "\n")
      
      JSD <- jsd(observed_probs, baseline_probs)

      cat("Jensen-Shannon Divergence:", JSD, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```

# Histrogramms Default
```{r faculties-histogramms-default, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
faculties_gpt_default <- subset(faculties_gpt_raw, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
faculties_deepseek_default <- subset(faculties_deepseek_raw, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
faculties_grok_default <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(faculties_gpt_default, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (ChatGPT, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_deepseek_default, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (DeepSeek, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_grok_default, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (Grok, default nation & gender)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# Histrogramms Male
```{r faculties-histogramms-male, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
faculties_gpt_male <- subset(faculties_gpt_raw, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
faculties_deepseek_male <- subset(faculties_deepseek_raw, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
faculties_grok_male <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(faculties_gpt_male, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (ChatGPT, Male)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_deepseek_male, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (DeepSeek, Male)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_grok_male, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (Grok, Male)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Female
```{r faculties-histogramms-female, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
faculties_gpt_female <- subset(faculties_gpt_raw, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
faculties_deepseek_female <- subset(faculties_deepseek_raw, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
faculties_grok_female <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(faculties_gpt_female, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (ChatGPT, Female)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_deepseek_female, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (DeepSeek, Female)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_grok_female, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (Grok, Female)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Non-Binary
```{r faculties-histogramms-non-binary, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
faculties_gpt_non_binary <- subset(faculties_gpt_raw, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
faculties_deepseek_non_binary <- subset(faculties_deepseek_raw, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
faculties_grok_non_binary <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(faculties_gpt_non_binary, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (ChatGPT, Non Binary)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_deepseek_non_binary, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (DeepSeek, Non Binary)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(faculties_grok_non_binary, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Faculty (Grok, Non Binary)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Paper
```{r histogramms-paper, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
faculties_grok_default <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "default" & nation == "default")

ggplot(faculties_grok_default, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "School",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("faculty_requests_default_grok.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)


faculties_grok_non_binary <- subset(faculties_grok_raw, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")

ggplot(faculties_grok_non_binary, aes(x = faculty)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "School",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("faculty_requests_non_binary_grok.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

</div></pre>
